2605.02712.title: mdok-style at SemEval-2026 Task 10: Finetuning LLMs for Conspiracy Detection
2605.02712.paper_summary: SemEval-2026 Task 10 is focused on conspiracy detection. Specifically, the goal is to detect whether a Reddit comment expresses a conspiracy belief. Our submitted mdok-style system utilizes data augmentation and self-training (to cope with a rather small amount of training data) to finetune the Qwen3-32B model for a binary text-classification task. The submitted system is very competitive, ranking in the 85th percentile (8th out of 52 submissions). The results shown that our approach, which originated in machine-generated text detection, can be used for conspiracy detection as well.
2605.02712.paper_summary_zh: SemEval-2026 任務 10 專注於陰謀檢測。<lb/>具體而言，目標是檢測 Reddit 評論是否表達陰謀信念。<lb/>我們提交的 mdok 風格系統利用數據增強和自我訓練（以應對相對較少的訓練數據）來微調 Qwen3-32B 模型，以進行二元文本分類任務。<lb/>提交的系統非常具有競爭力，排名在第 85 百分位（52 次提交中的第 8 位）。<lb/>結果顯示，我們的方案源於機器生成文本檢測，也可以用於陰謀檢測。
2605.02712.author: Dominik Macko et.al.
